message:
refactor(tests): clippy and idiom improvements across test suites

counting_taxonomy_contract: Replaces push_str(format!(...)) with
write!(buf, ...) for fixture parity log generation (clippy::format_push_string),
and replaces .map(|x| x != val).unwrap_or(true) with .map_or(true, ...).

perf_baseline_variance: Promotes four pure functions to const fn
(is_acceptable, as_str, t_critical_95, t_critical_99), adds
clippy::cast_sign_loss allow on percentile, replaces manual FMA with
mul_add, uses f64::from() instead of as-cast, and inlines format args
in eprintln.

rpc_session_connector: Replaces target_id = x.clone() with
target_id.clone_from() to reuse allocation, and inlines format
arguments in three assert! messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
